prompt: /ulw make configuration errors substantially easier to diagnose without breaking the existing CLI

hard_checks.description: The fixture's invalid layered value produces the normalized error/exit contract.
The layered-source fixture identifies the actual failing source and raw value.
Existing CLI inputs and exit-code behavior remain compatible.

rubric.audience: Developers diagnosing configuration assembled from defaults, files, and environment overrides.
constraints: Preserve existing CLI compatibility and scriptability.
task_specific_anchors: The result identifies which source and value caused the failure.
The recovery path is actionable rather than merely friendlier prose.
The solution reduces future diagnosis effort across more than the seeded example.
